name: Firecrawl
description: Web scraping, crawling, search, and structured data extraction via the official Firecrawl MCP server. Supports cloud and self-hosted instances.

fields.label: Firecrawl API Key
fields.description: API key from https://www.firecrawl.dev/app/api-keys (optional for self-hosted)

apiUrl.description: Custom API URL for self-hosted Firecrawl instances (e.g. https://firecrawl.your-domain.com)

retryMaxAttempts.description: Maximum retry attempts for rate-limited requests
